title: Mediterranean Chicken Pilaf
description: A flavorful and healthy Mediterranean-inspired pilaf dish with chicken, savory spices, and creamy feta cheese.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat. Add the chicken breast and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the pilaf to the skillet and stir to combine with the chicken. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the pilaf is tender.
Remove the skillet from the oven and stir in the crumbled feta cheese. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
